seoTitle: Edgecombe vs Edi — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Edgecombe and Edi. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Edgecombe and Edi.
heading: Edgecombe vs Edi — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Edgecombe, Victoria and Edi, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Edi has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Edgecombe (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Edgecombe or Edi safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Edgecombe has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Edi scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Edgecombe scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Edi scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Edgecombe or Edi?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Edi has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
